task_description: Major production upgrade of Anime Guide Engine: PostgreSQL migration, seed expansion to 1000+ anime, cron sync, SEO enhancements (canonical URLs, OG images, FAQ schema), new page types (studio, comparison, season, top lists), user engagement features (dark mode, bookmarks, episode tracking, share buttons, comments, blog), API caching, error boundaries, and image optimization.

verification.summary: npm run build passes (all 24 routes compile, 8 static pages pre-rendered, season/top pages have ISR). npm run lint has 1 pre-existing error in SearchBar.tsx unrelated to changes. No test framework configured. Semantic review (v1) surfaced 7 issues, 6 were fixed in follow-up commit.
